payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled, so the requested query was not run. No memory was created or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL/debug command, not a durable user memory claim. SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Rejected admin SQL request because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug inspection command if available.
